sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 19.75 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.19)

statement.latex: Let$P$be a finite 2-group of exponent$2^e$such that the rank of every abelian subgroup is at most$r$. Is it true that$|P| 2^{r(e+1)}$? This bound would be sharp (for a direct product of quaternion groups). { B.\,Sambale} No, it is not true, as follows from the examples constructed in (A.\,Yu.\,Olshanskii, Math. Notes, { 23} (1978), 183--185). (A.\,Mann, Letter of 23 April 2018.)

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
